data.title: Celonis promotes open ecosystems at WEF Davos 2026 to enhance AI impact.
data.description: A renowned Process Intelligence company will showcase the importance of open ecosystems and data access in connecting AI's potential with real economic benefits at an event in Munich and New York. This demonstration aims to emphasize the significance of these factors in translating AI hype into tangible economic outcomes.

data.title: Oshkosh Defense will showcase its JLTV at IAV Conference, featuring 24,000 vehicles produced for US Armed Forces.
data.description: Oshkosh Defense, LLC, a business of Oshkosh Corporation [NYSE: OSK], is set to exhibit its Joint Light Tactical Vehicle (JLTV) platform at the International Armoured Vehicles (IAV) Conference on January 20-22, 2026, at Booth D8 in Farnborough, England. The company aims to showcase the versatility of the JLTV in meeting changing operational needs and modernization criteria for allied forces. Having already delivered more than 24,000 JLTVs to the U.S. Armed Forces and global coalition partners, Oshkosh Defense demonstrates its commitment to enhancing military capabilities worldwide.

data.title: Europe's tech services market peaked in Q4 with strong demand for AI, cloud, and managed services, showing best performance of 2025: ISG Index.
data.description: Technology services in Europe experienced a surge in demand during the fourth quarter of 2025, achieving record numbers as reported by the ISG Index. This marked the peak performance for the region in that year, indicating a notable increase in the utilization of technology services.

data.title: PCBAIR in Shenzhen, China upgrades heavy-copper PCBs to tackle AI thermal bottlenecks, enhancing AI model computational demands.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on January 19, 2026, PCBAIR, a leading PCB manufacturer and assembly provider, responded to the increasing computational needs of AI models by tackling a crucial issue: thermal management. The demand for AI models has been rising significantly, leading to a strain on the hardware that supports them. To combat this industry challenge, PCBAIR launched initiatives to enhance thermal management solutions for better performance.

data.title: Posiflex to showcase AI-powered retail innovation at EuroShop 2026 event in Germany, highlighting advanced technologies for retail industry.
data.description: Posiflex Technology, Inc., a prominent player in Point of Sale (POS) systems and Online-to-Offline (O2O) solutions, will showcase its newest lineup of retail innovations at EuroShop 2026 in Messe Düsseldorf, Germany from February 22 to 26, 2026. This demonstration at the 60th edition of the renowned retail trade fair will highlight how AI-driven advancements and tailored system designs are adept at meeting the ever-changing requirements of the retail landscape.

data.title: Wrisk secures investment from Allianz Holdings plc in Series B funding round for digital insurance platform.
data.description: Today in London, on January 19, 2026, Wrisk Limited, a digital insurance platform focusing on embedded insurance for the automotive industry, revealed that Allianz Holdings plc has made an investment in the company as a component of their Series B funding round. No specific investment amount was disclosed.

data.title: SUNRATE partners with Juniper Travel Technology to enhance global travel services. Alliance announced on Jan. 19, 2026.
data.description: Sunrate, a worldwide payment and treasury management platform, has revealed a recent partnership with Juniper Travel Technology, a global provider of travel technology. The alliance demonstrates the companies' dedication to revolutionizing the global travel industry. This announcement was made in London on January 19, 2026, through a press release distributed by PRNewswire.

data.title: NVISAGE will present NEO-E Portable Launch Monitor at Golfmesse 2026 in Europe from Jan 29 to Feb 1.
data.description: NVISAGE Technologies, an innovative golf technology provider in the United States, is set to present its newest portable launch monitor NEO-E at Golfmesse 2026, a prominent golf expo in Europe. Scheduled from January 29 to February 1, the event will offer attendees the opportunity to experience the cutting-edge features of the NEO-E. NVISAGE Technologies aims to showcase the device's advanced capabilities to a wide audience, highlighting its potential to revolutionize the golfing experience.

data.title: Bang & Olufsen began a share buyback program on 15 Aug 2025 to support the company’s incentive programs.
data.description: On August 15, 2025, Bang & Olufsen began a share repurchase program to support the firm's share-based long-term incentive plans, aligning with EU Commission Regulation No. 596/2014 and the Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052.

data.title: Bill Ackman views Jack Dorsey's Bitchat app as beneficial for evading internet shutdowns in Iran.
data.description: Billionaire hedge fund manager Bill Ackman recently expressed his belief that Block's decentralized messaging app, Bitchat, could serve as a valuable communication tool in censored environments such as Iran. Ackman highlighted the potential for Bitchat to revolutionize messaging in Iran in response to a post discussing the app, developed by Jack Dorsey's Block, which facilitates message delivery via Bluetooth. Ackman, also the CEO of Pershing Square Capital Management, emphasized the utility of Bitchat in Iran, where a recent nationwide internet shutdown followed significant anti-regime activities. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nxera Pharma reports positive phase 3 trial results for daridorexant in South Korea. Marketing application planned in Q1 2026.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. shared encouraging results from a Phase 3 trial in South Korea, studying the effects of daridorexant 50 mg on insomnia in adult and elderly patients. The company, listed under TSE 4565, intends to seek approval for daridorexant in South Korea by early 2026, with anticipated clearance in the same region by the first quarter of 2027.

data.title: Kaldalón hf. bought 150,000 shares in week 3 of 2026, spending ISK 4,080,000 as part of its buyback program.
data.description: During the third week of 2026, Kaldalón hf. bought back 150,000 shares for a total amount of ISK 4,080,000.
